subject: English
chapter: A Tale of Valour: Major Somnath Sharma and the Battle of Badgam

activities_projects.title: Qualities of Leadership
activities_projects.objective: Analyse leadership qualities shown by Major Somnath Sharma
steps: Read the section describing the Battle of Badgam
Identify leadership qualities shown by Major Somnath Sharma
Write examples from the story supporting each quality
Discuss how these qualities helped motivate soldiers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse leadership traits such as courage, responsibility, and determination
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and supporting examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Battle Strategy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the strategy used during the Battle of Badgam
steps: Read the description of the battle carefully
Identify the challenges faced by the soldiers
Discuss how Major Somnath Sharma responded to these challenges
Explain how his decisions helped delay the enemy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand strategic thinking and decision-making in difficult situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and understanding of strategy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Context Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the historical background of the 1947 conflict in Kashmir
steps: Research the events that led to the Battle of Badgam
Find information about Operation Gulmarg and the invasion of Kashmir
Write a short report explaining the historical context
Present your findings to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect literature with historical events
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Reflection Activity
activities_projects.objective: Reflect on the values demonstrated by Major Somnath Sharma
steps: List the values shown in the chapter such as patriotism and sacrifice
Explain how these values are reflected in the story
Write a paragraph describing how these values can be applied in daily life
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect moral values from the story with real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of reflection and clarity of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate on Courage and Duty
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group discusses the importance of courage in leadership
The other group discusses the importance of duty and responsibility
Conduct a structured debate and present arguments
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop argument and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary in Context
activities_projects.objective: Understand advanced vocabulary used in the chapter
steps: Identify words such as resolute, tenacity, and unparalleled
Write their meanings and synonyms
Create sentences using these words
Discuss how these words describe the battle situation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and contextual understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Activity – Battle Location
activities_projects.objective: Locate geographical places mentioned in the chapter
steps: Locate Kashmir Valley on the map
Identify Srinagar and Badgam
Discuss why these locations were strategically important
Write a short explanation about the importance of geography in battles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand geographical significance in historical events
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of locations and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Gallantry Awards
activities_projects.objective: Learn about Indian military gallantry awards
steps: Research the Param Vir Chakra, Maha Vir Chakra, and Vir Chakra
Compare their significance
Write a short paragraph explaining why these awards are important
Present your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand national awards and military honours
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Speech on Patriotism
activities_projects.objective: Develop public speaking and persuasive skills
steps: Write a speech about the importance of patriotism
Include examples from the chapter
Practice delivering the speech
Present it in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve communication and presentation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Confidence, clarity, and relevance of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflective Essay
steps: Write an essay about the sacrifices made by soldiers
Use examples from the story of Major Somnath Sharma
Explain how such sacrifices protect the nation
Conclude with your thoughts about serving the country
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop reflective and analytical writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Essay structure, clarity of ideas, and grammar (10 marks)
